title: Movie Search Application
subtitle: Debouncing, custom hooks, generic API types, and paginated search
prerequisites: week1 — useState, controlled forms, useEffect, and fetch from Days 4–6
day08 — fetch/async patterns, loading/error/empty states, API interfaces, useEffect cleanup
expectedOutcome: Implement debounced search to reduce unnecessary API calls
Extract reusable useDebounce and useMovieSearch custom hooks
Type paginated API responses with generic TypeScript interfaces
Build search with loading, empty, error, and pagination UI states
Explain debouncing and controlled components in interview terms
definitionOfDone: Search input debounces before triggering API requests
Movie results display in a responsive grid or list
Loading, empty, and error states handled correctly
No request storm on every keystroke in Network tab

tomorrowPreview.title: E-Commerce Product Listing
tomorrowPreview.summary: Tomorrow you will filter, sort, and search product lists with array chaining, React keys, and React.memo — building scalable list UIs without global state.
